title: Stop Prompting Claude. Start Loop Engineering.
summary: Loop Engineering, also called Claude Loops, is a structured approach to AI automation that replaces traditional prompting. The technique consists of five building blocks: Trigger, Execution Skills, Goal and Verification, Output and Memory, and involves iterative cycles rather than one-off prompts.
